understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', without landing on spike tiles, within the per-attempt turn limit (50) and the 2-attempt limit per level, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action: MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal movement only), CLICK a specific coordinate to remove a clickable/breakable tile (e.g., 'x') without moving, or UNDO to revert the last action. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the player in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other solid), hit a hazard, or reach '+'. Landing on spikes ('u'/'v') immediately ends the attempt/run. Clicks are used to open or modify fall paths by removing blocks; UNDO can correct a mistaken move/click.
